'''Outpost 327''', also known as '''Imperial Colony Outpost 327''', was a [[Golan Space Colony 2]]-type facility located in the [[Zhar system]], it appeared to function as a cargo depot of sorts and was usually surrounded by various types of freighters and cargo containers, as well as provide a docking facility for shuttles and transports. It was heavily defended, at one point in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] its defenses included a squadron of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]], two squadrons of [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]] and a squadron of [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]], as well as the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Inexorable (Imperial I-class)|''Inexorable'']]. However, it was unclear whether these were the actual station's defenses, or ''Judicator's'' own complement of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].
[[File:327inter.jpg|thumb|left|The interior of the Outpost. ''Tydirium'' can be seen on the right of the tunnel.]]
At this time, the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttles]] [[Tydirium/Legends|''Tydirium'']], [[Deuterium (shuttle)|''Deuterium'']], ''[[Illudium]]'', [[Iridium (shuttle)|''Iridium'']], ''[[Mercurium]]'', [[Uranium (shuttle)|''Uranium'']], ''[[Viridium]]'' and ''[[Xiridium]]'' were also docked on the outpost, until the former was stolen by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] pilot [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]].

==Behind the scenes==
Years after ''X-Wing Alliance'' was released, ''[[Kyle Katarn's Tale]]'' mentioned the fictional ore [[Tydirium (ore)|tydirium]], establilshing that shuttle ''Tydirium'' also shares a name with an element.
